name: chromatography-rspress-docs
description: Dummy package to trigger root build for Baota Webhook

scripts.build: cd .. && npm install --include=dev --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com && (npm run build:doc > build.log 2>&1 || true) && mkdir -p chromatography-rspress-docs/build_doc && cp -rf build_doc/* chromatography-rspress-docs/build_doc/ || true && cp build.log chromatography-rspress-docs/build_doc/build.txt || true
